description: Type the opening paragraph of 'Alice's Adventures in Wonderland' by Lewis Carroll into a Sugar Write document titled 'Alice Chapter 1'. The text to include is: 'Alice was beginning to get very tired of sitting by her sister on the bank, and of having nothing to do: once or twice she had peeped into the book her sister was reading, but it had no pictures or conversations in it, and what is the use of a book, thought Alice, without pictures or conversations?' Use the reference file at /home/ga/Documents/alice_in_wonderland.txt.
